title: Blue Origin's New Glenn Rocket Explodes on Launchpad
title_cn: 蓝色起源的新格伦火箭在发射台上爆炸
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded while undergoing a test on a launchpad in Florida on Thursday evening. The explosion is the latest blow to its reputation as a reliable alternative to SpaceX’s Falcon 9. (Source: @JConcilus via Associated Press)

title: Blue Origin Rocket Explodes on Launchpad in Florida
title_cn: 蓝色起源火箭在佛罗里达州发射台爆炸
summary: User generated video verified by Associated Press shows the Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explode in a massive fireball while undergoing a test on a Florida launchpad Thursday evening. The firm was preparing the vehicle for its fourth launch, which was slated to deploy a batch of satellites for Amazon.com Inc.’s Leo, a rival satellite network to SpaceX’s Starlink. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Declines on US-Iran Ceasefire Optimism
title_cn: 美伊停火乐观情绪推动油价下跌
summary: Oil fell as the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days. Brent is set for its biggest monthly drop since 2020 on optimism that flows through the Strait of Hormuz may resume. Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Set for 19% Collapse in May as Traders Bet On Truce Renewal
title_cn: 交易商押注续签休战协议，油价预计 5 月暴跌 19%
summary: Oil fell as the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days, with Brent set for the biggest monthly drop since 2020 on optimism that flows through the Strait of Hormuz may resume.

title: Hong Kong: On Track to Meet or Exceed 2026 Visitor Target
title_cn: 香港：有望达到或超过 2026 年游客目标
summary: Rosanna Law, Hong Kong's Secretary for Culture, Sports and Tourism, says the city is on track to reach its 53.8 million visitor arrivals target for 2026 and is currently running slightly ahead. She speaks with Yvonne Man and David Ingles on Bloomberg: The China Show (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boston Dynamics' Schulman on US Robotics Strategy
title_cn: 波士顿动力公司的舒尔曼谈美国机器人战略
summary: Brendan Schulman,  Vice President of Policy and Government Relations at Boston Dynamics, discusses his view on how the US government and firms should approach the development of robotics technology, and the competition on deploying such technology in other countries like China and Japan. He speaks on the sidelines of the Tokyo Humanoids Summit on "Bloomberg: The China Show" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alpac Capital Agrees to Buy Adria News Network From United Group
title_cn: Alpac Capital 同意从 United Group 手中收购 Adria News Network
summary: Alpac Capital agreed to buy Adria News Network, which has news assets in Bosnia, Croatia, Montenegro, Serbia and Slovenia, from United Group BV, according to a statement released Friday.

title: Fried Chicken Cutlet Chain Zhengxin Food Is Said to Consider Hong Kong IPO
title_cn: 炸鸡排连锁正新食品传考虑赴港IPO
summary: Shanghai Zhengxin Food Group Co., a chain specializing in fried chicken cutlets, is exploring an initial public offering in Hong Kong that may raise about $300 million, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Humanoids: from Spectacle to Scale | Bloomberg Tech: Asia 5/29/2026
title_cn: 类人机器人：从奇观到规模 |彭博科技：亚洲 2026 年 5 月 29 日
summary: The race to bring humanoid robots into the real world begins in earnest. Bloomberg Intelligence says humanoids will be the next big tech platform in the coming decade. Shery Ahn discusses the challenges of commercializing and scaling a fast-growing industry with Google DeepMind, Honda's Frontier Robotics, and Bloomberg Intelligence, at the Humanoid Summit in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rise to Record, Oil Drops on Iran Optimism: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市上涨至创纪录水平，油价因伊朗乐观情绪而下跌：市场结束
summary: Stocks scaled to a record and oil dropped after the US and Iran reached a tentative deal to extend their ceasefire, pending President Donald Trump’s signoff.

title: Jupiter Fund Taps Europe’s AI Energy Boom to Beat 92% of Peers
title_cn: Jupiter 基金利用欧洲人工智能能源热潮击败 92% 的同行
summary: Homing in on stocks at the heart of Europe’s electrification push has helped a Jupiter Asset Management fund team outperform 92% of its peers this year.

title: Japan Banks See Hybrid Bond Boom to Fund Regulatory Capital
title_cn: 日本银行看到混合债券蓬勃发展，为监管资本提供资金
summary: Japan’s major banks are set for their busiest fiscal year in over a decade for issuing a special category of bonds that will finance higher capital requirements.

title: Billionaire Vincent Tan Said to Mull Selling Prudential Malaysia Stake
title_cn: 亿万富翁 Vincent Tan 表示考虑出售保德信马来西亚股份
summary: Billionaire Vincent Tan is considering selling his 30% stake in Prudential Assurance Malaysia Bhd., people with knowledge of the matter said, after already offloading a 19% holding earlier this year.

title: Anthropic Eclipses Rival OpenAI With Valuation of $965 Billion
title_cn: Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元，超越竞争对手 OpenAI
summary: Anthropic raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the AI company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Cuts Monsoon Forecast to 90% of Normal in Risk to Crops
title_cn: 印度将季风预报下调至正常作物风险的 90%
summary: India lowered its forecast for this year’s monsoon, a blow to farmers who are already contending with higher input costs due to the Middle East conflict.

title: Japan’s Two-Year Bond Yield Rises After Lukewarm Auction
title_cn: 日本两年期债券收益率在拍卖不温不火后上升
summary: Japan’s two-year government bond yield edged higher after an auction of the tenor saw slightly weak demand as investors bet on a near-term interest rate hike by the Bank of Japan.

title: Aggressive Asia Hikes Show Few Signs of Stabilizing Currencies
title_cn: 亚洲激进的加息几乎没有显示出稳定货币的迹象
summary: Asian central banks are turning to ever more aggressive interest-rate hikes to shore up currencies, though there are few signs of success.

title: Honda R&D’s Yoshiike on Global Robotics Competition
title_cn: 本田研发部的 Yoshiike 谈全球机器人大赛
summary:
Takahide Yoshiike, Executive Chief Engineer for Honda’s R&D Frontier Robotics division, notes that while global competition in robotics is intense, each region has distinct strengths. Chinese companies excel at reducing production costs for humanoid robots, the United States leads in AI chip development, and Japan’s advantage lies in manufacturing precise, high-quality hardware.
He also discusses the evolution of Honda’s humanoid robotics efforts. He speaks with Shery Ahn from the sidelines of the Tokyo Humanoids Summit on "Bloomberg Tech Asia". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Deepmind's Parada on Robotics Technology
title_cn: 谷歌 Deepmind 的机器人技术 Parada
summary: Carolina Parada, VP and Head of Robotics at Google Deepmind, says “embodied intelligence is the next frontier of artificial intelligence.” She is focused on pushing the boundaries of robots’ ability to perform highly dexterous tasks, such as folding origami or packing a lunch box. Parada also discusses the development and research direction of Gemini Robotics. She speaks with Shery Ahn on the sidelines of the Tokyo Humanoids Summit on "Bloomberg Tech Asia". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iron Ore Heads for Monthly Loss as Coal Spike Pressures Margins
title_cn: 煤炭价格上涨令利润率承压，铁矿石月度亏损
summary: Iron ore headed for a monthly loss as a short-lived rally triggered by a fatal steelmaking-coal mine accident in China’s Shanxi province faded, leaving investors focused on mill margins and mounting shipments.

title: Global Stocks Rally on Hopes of US-Iran Deal | The Asia Trade 5/29/2026
title_cn: 全球股市因美伊协议的希望而上涨亚洲贸易 5/29/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Sydney with Paul Allen and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Huge fireball seen after Blue Origin rocket explosion
title_cn: 蓝色起源火箭爆炸后出现巨大火球
summary:
Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket exploded in a massive fireball while undergoing a test on a Florida launchpad Thursday evening.

It deals a major setback to the Jeff Bezos-backed firm in its efforts to challenge a dominant SpaceX. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Holds Above $4,500 as Iran Deal Hopes Ease Inflation Fears
title_cn: 伊朗协议有望缓解通胀担忧，金价维持在 4,500 美元上方
summary: Gold held a gain after reports that the US and Iran had reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war eased inflation concerns.

title: Japan Can Act on Currency If There’s Volatility, Katayama Says
title_cn: 片山表示，如果出现波动，日本可以对货币采取行动
summary: Japanese Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama reiterated that authorities can step into the foreign exchange market if there’s volatility or evidence of speculative moves, in comments ahead of data expected to confirm authorities intervened at some point during the past month.

title: Industrial Metals Set for Best Month Since January on Iran Truce
title_cn: 工业金属因伊朗停战而创一月以来最佳月度
summary: Industrial metals headed for their best monthly gain since January after the US and Iran reached a tentative deal to extend their ceasefire by 60 days.

title: Philippines' Marcos on Building a Legacy of His Own
title_cn: 菲律宾马科斯谈打造自己的遗产
summary: Heir to the Philippines' most famous political dynasty, President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr has had to contend with the complicated history of his family name. Now with two years left in his single-term presidency, Marcos is facing the economic consequences of a rupture in global geopolitics, a rapidly changing technological landscape, and a growing feud at home with his Vice President Sara Duterte, who is herself a successor of another prominent political family. In this latest episode of Latitude, the Philippine president opens up to Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin on how he is forging ahead to try and build a legacy of his very own.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ferdinand Marcos Jr Addresses Spat with VP Duterte
title_cn: 小费迪南德·马科斯解决与副总统杜特尔特的争执
summary: The Philippine President's uneasy alliance with his Vice President has escalated into a second impeachment for Sara Duterte in as many years, and chaos within the Senate. Marcos shares his views on the rivalry between the two families in an exclusive interview with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin on "Latitude". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Credit Agricole Taps Japan Samurai Market at Wider Spread
title_cn: 法国农业信贷银行更广泛地开拓日本武士市场
summary: Credit Agricole SA set terms for ¥106.5 billion ($670 million) of samurai bonds, offering wider spreads than comparable domestic corporate debt amid rising benchmark yen rates.

title: Singapore’s Sea Sets Up AI Investment Team as Part of Pivot
title_cn: 新加坡海洋成立人工智能投资团队作为 Pivot 的一部分
summary: Sea Ltd. has set up a dedicated team to scout for new investments in AI, part of a broader effort to accelerate forays into the technology as it hunts for its next growth engine beyond e-commerce.

title: Samsung, SK Rally Sparks Forced Selling as Funds Hit Limits
title_cn: 资金触及极限，三星、SK 涨势引发被迫抛售
summary: A blistering rally in Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. has turned into an unexpected headache for some funds, whose positions have grown so large they’re now forced to sell.

title: Job Market Jitters as AI Demand Grows: Markets Snapshot
title_cn: 随着人工智能需求的增长，就业市场出现紧张：市场快照
summary:
Equity benchmarks across Asia and the US saw new highs this week, driven by optimism around the resonant AI trade despite growing concerns of potential disruptions to the labor market. 
The Opening Trade spoke with industry experts and leading market voices on how companies and regions are preparing for a latent transformation to jobs.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lenovo Doubles in Best Month Since 1999 on AI-Fueled Rally
title_cn: 人工智能推动股价上涨，联想股价实现 1999 年以来最佳月度翻倍
summary: Lenovo Group Ltd. is set for its best month in more than a quarter-century, with the stock doubling in May as investor enthusiasm builds around the company’s AI-driven growth outlook.

title: Investors Bet Big on Humanoid Robots
title_cn: 投资者在人形机器人上押下重注
summary: the Humanoids Summit in Tokyo gathers leading companies, builders, and investors from around the world for live humanoid demonstrations and talks on commercialization, mass production, and safety. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key Themes to Watch at Asia’s Biggest AI Tech Show
title_cn: 亚洲最大的人工智能科技展值得关注的关键主题
summary: Nvidia Corp.’s Jensen Huang leads a parade of AI computing leaders in Taiwan for Asia’s biggest technology showcase, Computex. Over a jam-packed week, the hardware linchpins of the post-ChatGPT era will debate the most pressing issues facing their industry, from growing bottlenecks in the supply of essential components like memory chips to the rise of challengers to Nvidia at the apex of the semiconductor hierarchy.

title: Congo Defends Ebola Response as WHO Warns Contact Tracing Is Failing
title_cn: 世界卫生组织警告接触者追踪失败，刚果捍卫埃博拉应对措施
summary: Congo’s health minister pushed back against claims the country’s Ebola outbreak was spiraling out of control, even as World Health Organization officials warned insecurity and population displacement were preventing responders from tracing most suspected contacts.

title: China’s Troubled Consumer Funds Turn to Tech Stock Pickers
title_cn: 中国陷入困境的消费基金转向科技选股
summary: China’s battered consumer-focused funds are showing signs of pivoting to tech as a prolonged demand slump forces even the sector’s most committed backers to rethink their strategy.

title: Why The SpaceX IPO Is Unlike Any Other
title_cn: 为什么 SpaceX 的 IPO 与众不同
summary: What began as a rocket startup is now a big bet on satellites, AI and Mars. With a projected valuation of at least $1.8 trillion, SpaceX’s IPO could reshape markets. But is Wall Street rushing in too fast? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BYD Debuts Smart-Driving Chip It Calls China’s Most Powerful
title_cn: 比亚迪发布中国最强智能驾驶芯片
summary: BYD Co., the world’s largest electric vehicle maker, unveiled a series of technology advances including what it calls China’s most powerful chip for self-driving cars.

title: Dell Shares Soar 40% After Outlook Tops Estimates on AI Boom
title_cn: 展望人工智能热潮，戴尔股价飙升 40%
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. shares gained almost 40% in extended trading after the hardware maker gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.

title: Samsung Takes Lead in Shipping Top-End AI Memory Chip Samples
title_cn: 三星在顶级人工智能存储芯片样品出货方面处于领先地位
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. has begun shipping samples of the industry’s most advanced memory to customers, taking an early lead in a race to supply the essential components for AI accelerators made by the likes of Nvidia Corp.

title: China Targets Offshore Billions in Biggest Crackdown in Decades
title_cn: 中国数十年来最大规模打击打击海外数十亿美元
summary: It started with a tax bill.

title: Stocks & Bonds Rise After US-Iran Deal Reports | The Close 5/28/2026
title_cn: 美伊协议报道后股票和债券上涨|收盘价 2026 年 5 月 28 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Wells Fargo Chief Equity Strategist Ohsung Kwon, Hormel Foods President John Ghingo, Tola Capital Founder & Managing Director Sheila Gulati, Former LVMH North America Chair Pauline Brown, StoneX Group Chief Market Strategist & Chief Economist Kathryn Rooney Vera, Founder ETFs Portfolio Manager Michael Monaghan, Evercore Equity Analyst Peter Levine, Alex Mill Chairman Mickey Drexler, & Kearney Consumer Institute Lead Katie Thomas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Moving Plastic Production Beyond Oil
title_cn: 让塑料生产超越石油
summary:
Albert Douer, UBQ Materials Chairman and CEO says his dream is for more countries to adopt his technology so trash becomes seen as something with value and plastic production can rely less on oil.  
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dell CFO Kennedy Sees AI Server Demand Driving Sales Growth
title_cn: 戴尔首席财务官肯尼迪认为人工智能服务器需求推动销售增长
summary: Dell CFO David Kennedy says the increase in AI server demand is why the company boosted its annual sales forecast. Speaking with Ed Ludlow on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition," Kennedy also comments on Dell's $9.7 billion Pentagon software deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dell Boosts Outlook to $60B in AI Server Sales This Year
title_cn: 戴尔今年 AI 服务器销售额展望提升至 60B 美元
summary:
Bloomberg News reporter Brody Ford says Dell's server business is helping the company's revenue benefit from the AI boom. 
Dell gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.
Revenue in the fiscal year ending in January 2027 will be about $167 billion, including $60 billion from the sale of AI servers, the Texas-based company said Thursday in a statement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Billion-Dollar Quest to Build AI That Improves Itself
title_cn: 耗资十亿美元打造自我改进的人工智能
summary: A growing number of AI companies are focusing on an unproven approach called recursive self-improvement.

title: Apollo Shops $36 Billion Debt Deal to Buy Google Chips for Anthropic
title_cn: Apollo 斥资 360 亿美元债务交易为 Anthropic 购买谷歌芯片
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. are working to bring additional investors into a roughly $36 billion debt financing deal to help Anthropic PBC build out its AI infrastructure.

title: Emerging Currencies Rally for Seventh Day on US-Iran Pact Report
title_cn: 美伊协议报告推动新兴货币连续第七天上涨
summary: Emerging-market currencies advanced on Thursday — extending a winning streak to a seventh consecutive session — as the US and and Iran near an accord to end the war.

title: Autodesk to Buy MaintainX for About $3.6 Billion in Cash
title_cn: Autodesk将以约36亿美元现金收购MaintainX
summary: Engineering software maker Autodesk Inc. has agreed to buy MaintainX, a firm focused on maintenance tools.

title: Solar Firm Nextpower Eyes AI’s Power Needs With Battery Deal
title_cn: 太阳能公司 Nextpower 通过电池交易关注人工智能的电力需求
summary: Nextpower Inc. agreed to buy battery company Prevalon Energy for as much as $365 million, marking the solar-tracking provider’s move into energy storage and the fast-growing AI data-center market.

title: The Battle Is On to Win Attention and Money as Linear TV Declines
title_cn: 随着线性电视的衰落，赢得注意力和金钱的战斗正在进行
summary: With traditional TV audiences diminishing, everyone from Piers Morgan to OpenAI is trying to capitalize on the moment

title: For International Fintechs, America Is the Grand Prize
title_cn: 对于国际金融科技公司来说，美国是大奖
summary: Revolut, Nubank and Wise are among the overseas firms competing for consumers’ dollars in the world’s biggest market.

title: BNY CEO Says Artificial Intelligence Is a 'Super Power'
title_cn: 纽约银行首席执行官表示人工智能是“超级力量”
summary: BNY CEO Robin Vince talks about the history of their business, how they use artificial intelligence, and how the technology is impacting jobs. He speaks on Bloomberg Surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Raises $65 Billion in Funding Round, Eclipses OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 在一轮融资中筹集了 650 亿美元，让 OpenAI 黯然失色
summary: Anthropic PBC raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the artificial intelligence company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Eclipses OpenAI With Valuation of $965 Billion
title_cn: Anthropic 估值 9650 亿美元，超越 OpenAI
summary: Anthropic PBC raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the artificial intelligence company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time.

title: Swiss Police Say Knife Attack Was ‘Terrorist’ Incident
title_cn: 瑞士警方称持刀袭击是“恐怖”事件
summary: Three people were injured in a knife attack in the Swiss city of Winterthur on Thursday in what authorities have deemed a “terrorist” act.

title: US-Iran Peace Prospects Rise as Trump Weighs Fresh Truce
title_cn: 特朗普考虑新的休战协议，美伊和平前景上升
summary: The US and Iran reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and launch further talks on Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution. President Donald Trump has yet to agree to the terms. Bloomberg's Jon Herskovitz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Slovenian Premier Jansa Picks His Lawyer as Interior Minister
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚总理扬萨任命其律师为内政部长
summary: Slovenian nationalist leader Janez Jansa unveiled his cabinet late on Thursday, with a surprise pick of his lawyer Franci Matoz for the post of the nation’s interior minister.

title: Norway Presses EU to Drop Ban on Arctic Drilling of Oil and Gas
title_cn: 挪威敦促欧盟取消北极石油和天然气钻探禁令
summary: Norway is putting pressure on the European Union to remove a moratorium on new oil and gas drilling in the Arctic where almost two thirds of its petroleum resources lie.

title: Historian Ada Ferrer on Cuba’s Long Crisis
title_cn: 历史学家艾达·费雷尔谈古巴的长期危机
summary: Pulitzer Prize-winning historian Ada Ferrer reflects on the human cost of Cuba’s long crisis, as well as exile, guilt and family separation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Heads for Showdown With Armenia Over European Ambitions
title_cn: 俄罗斯将与亚美尼亚就欧洲野心展开摊牌
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin will join a summit of the Moscow-led Eurasian Economic Union on Friday amid growing tensions with Armenia over its shift toward Europe.

title: Pentagon’s Asia Commander Seeks Funds to Deter China on Taiwan
title_cn: 五角大楼亚洲司令寻求资金威慑中国台湾
summary: The US military is quietly seeking to bolster its ability to deter or battle China over Taiwan, including with new warship-killing bombs and advanced sea mines, the head of US Indo-Pacific Command said in a report to Congress.

title: The Political and Economic Battle to Shape Britain’s Future
title_cn: 塑造英国未来的政治和经济斗争
summary: How can Keir Starmer - or whoever leads the country next - help to turn the UK’s around? Simon French, Managing Director, Chief Economist and Head of Research at Panmure Liberum joins John Stepek to discuss former UK Prime Minister Tony Blair’s 5000 word prescription for the UK economy, the growing backlash towards Net-Zero policies and why the UK is at risk of sliding towards another "Liz Truss Moment." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australia Data-Center Boom May Keep Rates Higher, Westpac Says
title_cn: 西太平洋银行表示，澳大利亚数据中心的繁荣可能会导致费率走高
summary: The data-center boom in Australia, rivaling the country’s once-in-a-generation mining boom, could keep interest rates structurally higher than they were before the pandemic, according to Westpac Banking Corp.

title: US, Iran Agree to 60-Day Truce Renewal Pending Trump Signoff
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意延长 60 天停战协议，等待特朗普签署
summary: The US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and launch further talks on Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution.

title: The High Price of ‘America First’ Aid Deals
title_cn: “美国优先”援助协议的高昂代价
summary: USAID’s closure placed millions of lives at risk, studies show. Donald Trump’s new program requires minerals and data as a price of aid. In Mozambique, clinics now face hard choices as Ebola spreads. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hegseth Lands in Singapore for Talks Ahead of Asia Defense Forum
title_cn: 赫格斯抵达新加坡参加亚洲防务论坛之前的会谈
summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth arrived early Friday in Singapore, where he will meet with regional leaders and security counterparts ahead of a closely watched address at a major Asian security forum Saturday.

title: Machado Seeks Venezuela Election Talks With Interim Government
title_cn: 马查多寻求与临时政府进行委内瑞拉选举谈判
summary: Venezuela opposition leader Maria Corina Machado said she is willing to negotiate with the country’s interim government on a path to presidential elections backed by the US.

title: US, Iran Agree to 60-Day Truce Pending Trump Approval | Balance of Power: Late Edition 5/28/2026
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意 60 天休战，等待特朗普批准 |权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 5 月 28 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative John Garamendi (D-CA), a member of the House Armed Services Committee, says "absolutely not" to approving a $1.5 trillion defense budget or money above current appropriations without a clear justification, Representative Mike Lawler (R-NY), chair of the House Foreign Affairs Subcommittee on the Middle East and North Africa, says getting enriched uranium out of Iran is the "largest part" of any Iran deal, and David Kennedy, Dell CFO, says the increase in AI server demand is why the company boosted its annual sales forecast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Garamendi on Defense Spending, Iran
title_cn: 众议员加拉门迪谈伊朗国防开支
summary: Representative John Garamendi (D-CA), a member of the House Armed Services Committee, says "absolutely not" to approving a $1.5 trillion defense budget or money above current appropriations without a clear justification. He says the Iran war has shown Tehran it has "enormous leverage" over the Strait of Hormuz and any deal should at minimum restore open oil shipping and restart nuclear talks. Rep. Garamendi also argues Congress must reassert its war powers, saying President Trump is "clearly outside of the constitutional boundaries," and reacts to the FCC moving up the expiration of ABC station licenses. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Lawler: Uranium Is 'Biggest Part' of Iran Deal
title_cn: 众议员劳勒：铀是伊朗协议的“最大部分”
summary: Representative Mike Lawler (R-NY), chair of the House Foreign Affairs Subcommittee on the Middle East and North Africa, says getting enriched uranium out of Iran is the "largest part" of any Iran deal, calling it vital to President Trump and to ensuring Tehran does not get a nuclear weapon. He says a war powers resolution would only bolster Iran during negotiations, and defends Trump's dismissal of midterm politics, saying he cares more about the long-term stability and safety of Americans than "a single election." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Labels Brazil’s Two Main Drug Gangs as Terrorist Groups
title_cn: 美国将巴西两大贩毒团伙列为恐怖组织
summary: The US will designate Brazil’s two main organized crime groups as terrorist organizations, a move that will likely reignite tensions between Donald Trump and President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva.

title: Europe Weighs Less Reliance on US as Asia Doubles Down
title_cn: 亚洲加大力度，欧洲减少对美国的依赖
summary: Tension between the US and other NATO members is driving countries in Europe to consider collective defense that’s less reliant on America - yet the picture is much different in Asia.

title: Israel Cuts Ties With UN Chief Over Sexual Violence Report
title_cn: 以色列因性暴力报告与联合国秘书长断绝关系
summary: Israel announced plans to cut ties with the leader of the United Nations in a largely symbolic move to protest its inclusion on an annual report about sexual violence in conflict zones.

title: Bessent Briefs Press, Outlines Trump’s Conditions for Iran | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/28/2026
title_cn: Bessent 向媒体简报，概述了特朗普对伊朗的条件彭博商业周刊日报 5/28/2026
summary: On this episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Alexis Christoforous and Matt Miller speak with Jordan Fabian on the latest from Washington DC ahead of Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's press briefing. They also spoke with Bloomberg News US Treasury Reporter, Dan Flatley on the latest developments from the briefing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ship-Tracking Data Reveal Hidden Risk of China-Vietnam Showdown
title_cn: 船舶追踪数据揭示中越摊牌的隐藏风险
summary: A flurry of Vietnamese island fortifications and intensifying Chinese activity show the rising odds of confrontation in the South China Sea.

title: Trump’s Bid for Federal Employee NDAs Comes With a Long History
title_cn: 特朗普对联邦雇员保密协议的竞标由来已久
summary: The president pursued nondisclosure agreements in his business, TV careers before getting elected.

title: South East Water Seeks Fix After Downgrade Spurs License Breach
title_cn: 东南水务公司在降级后寻求解决许可证违规问题
summary: South East Water Ltd. is in talks with industry watchdog Ofwat to maintain its license after its debt was downgraded to junk by Moody’s Ratings.

title: Burnham Vows Tougher Stance on Big Tech, AI If He Becomes UK’s Next Prime Minister
title_cn: 伯纳姆誓言如果他成为英国下一任首相，将对大型科技和人工智能采取更强硬的立场
summary: Andy Burnham, who is seeking to become the UK prime minister this summer, said a government led by him would increase regulations on technology companies and intervene more widely in the economy.

title: Fed's Musalem Says He Expects Warsh Will Consult, Try and Steer FOMC
title_cn: 美联储穆萨勒姆表示，他预计沃什将咨询、尝试并指导联邦公开市场委员会
summary:
Fed's Musalem Says He Expects Warsh Will Consult, Try and Steer FOMC 
Alberto Musalem, St. Louis Federal Reserve president, said he expects new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh to consult with the full Federal Open Market Committee and then steer members to fulfill the Fed's dual mandate. 
Musalem, speaking to Stephanie Flanders at the Reykjavik economic conference, also said that while he is an AI optimist, it is a 'risky proposition' to rely on the possibility of productivity gains from AI to reduce inflation.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTC Chair Ferguson Says Agency Probing Fertilizer Industry
title_cn: 联邦贸易委员会主席弗格森表示该机构正在调查化肥行业
summary: The Federal Trade Commission recently launched an antitrust investigation into the rising costs of fertilizer in the US, the agency’s head said at an event in Texas on Thursday.

title: Iran Unlikely to Cede Leverage Over Hormuz, Says Clayton Seigle
title_cn: 克莱顿·西格尔表示，伊朗不太可能放弃对霍尔木兹海峡的影响力
summary: Clayton Seigle, senior fellow at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, said that now that Iran has seen the extent of the leverage the Strait of Hormuz holds over the oil market and the global economy, Tehran is unlikely to cede the new authority even if the US and Iran are able to reach a deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Truce Awaits Trump Signoff | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/28/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗休战等待特朗普签署权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 28 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss peace talks between the US and Iran. On today's show, Bluestack Strategies Founder Maura Gillespie, Rebelle Communications Founder Laura Fink, St. Louis Fed President Alberto Musalem, Democratic Congressman Mark Pocan of Wisconsin and Center for Strategic and International Studies Senior Fellow Clayton Seigle. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Investors Back Brazil’s Pax in Bet on AI-Powered Policing
title_cn: 美国投资者支持巴西的 Pax 押注人工智能驱动的警务
summary: A Brazilian artificial intelligence startup that helps police investigate violent crime is planning a rapid expansion at home, betting its technology is ready for wider use as Brazil confronts mounting public security concerns.

title: US Postal Service Pauses Discretionary Spending to Preserve Cash
title_cn: 美国邮政服务暂停可自由支配的支出以保存现金
summary: The United States Postal Service is suspending discretionary spending across the organization as it faces a looming liquidity crisis.
